ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tlds" (
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLD */,
  "tld_name" TEXT /* Name of the top-level domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the TLD was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the TLD information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the TLD (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TLD for this price */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration in years for which the price applies */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the specified duration and TLD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the price was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tld_id FOREIGN KEY ("tld_id") REFERENCES tlds ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain registration */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (excluding TLD) */,
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TLD of the domain */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was registered */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain registration expires */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who registered the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the domain was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the domain information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the domain (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for the domain (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the domain is set to auto-renew */,
  "lock_status" INTEGER /* Whether the domain is locked to prevent unauthorized transfers */,
  "dns_record" TEXT /* DNS records associated with the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_tld_id FOREIGN KEY ("tld_id") REFERENCES tlds ("tld_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer information was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for customer communication */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for customer account security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain registration for this invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount due for the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the invoice information was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the invoice is denominated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice for this payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment information was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrars" (
  "registrar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner registrar */,
  "registrar_name" TEXT /* Name of the registrar */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the registrar */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the registrar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the registrar was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the registrar information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registrar (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the registrar's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registrar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_providers" (
  "dns_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNS provider */,
  "dns_name" TEXT /* Name of the DNS provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the DNS provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the DNS provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the DNS provider was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the DNS provider information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the DNS provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the DNS provider's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dns_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosting_providers" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hosting provider */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the hosting provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the hosting provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the hosting provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the hosting provider was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the hosting provider information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the hosting provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the hosting provider's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_registrars" (
  "domain_registrar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain-registrar association */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain */,
  "registrar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registrar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the association information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_registrar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_registrars_registrar_id FOREIGN KEY ("registrar_id") REFERENCES registrars ("registrar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_registrars_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_dns" (
  "domain_dns_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain-DNS provider association */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain */,
  "dns_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DNS provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the association information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_dns_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_dns_dns_id FOREIGN KEY ("dns_id") REFERENCES dns_providers ("dns_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_dns_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_hosting" (
  "domain_hosting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain-hosting provider association */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hosting provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the association information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_hosting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_hosting_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_hosting_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical action */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., registration, renewal) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical record information was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_history_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)
